drift_source: Arithmetic error in original Fase 5 generation: two separate fields (decision_matrix.decision_summary and plan_packet top-level counts) were set by hand and disagreed with the actual item lists they summarize.

contradictions: plan_packet listed remove_candidate_count=9 but had a note 'Count is 9 but list shows 10' — self-contradictory
decision_matrix.decision_summary had BLOCKED=4 but the decisions list has only 3 BLOCKED entries (F5-013, F5-014, F5-015)
decision_matrix.decision_summary had REMOVE_CANDIDATE=9 but the decisions list has 10 REMOVE_CANDIDATE entries

files_not_changed: lapidarium_fase5_operator_approval_matrix.json — lists items individually, not by count summary
lapidarium_fase5_blocked_or_deferred_items.json — lists 3 BLOCKED + 2 NEEDS, no count fields
NEXT_ACTION.md — no stale count field found
